bead.title: runs: canonicalize Run data projection (fix state_runs.go bundle layering; lossless AgentSession join)
bead.description: state_runs.go:164 currently synthesizes execution bundles as RunLayerRun; per the three-layer model bundles should be RunLayerTry. Fix the layer assignment. Add lossless join with AgentSession (which carries billingMode, cached tokens, prompt/response/stderr, outcome — NOT in Run today). User decision: keep AgentSession as backing store under layer=run.
bead.acceptance: 1. state_runs.go: bundles → RunLayerTry; agent sessions → RunLayerRun. 2. Run resolver returns lossless join (Run + AgentSession fields when applicable). 3. Existing runs tests pass; add new test for layering correctness. 4. cd cli && go test ./internal/server/... passes.
